name: Orange Buttermilk Molded Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, bring the crushed pineapple to a boil.
2. Stir in the sugar-free orange jello and dissolve completely.
3. Cool mixture to room temperature.
4. Add buttermilk, thawed whipped topping, and chopped pecans.
5. Pour the mixture into an 8-cup mold or individual molds.
